assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddOperationalStore with ConfigureDbContext using UseSqlServer and a connection string
Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddDataProtection() with a persistence method such as PersistKeysToDbContext or PersistKeysToFileSystem
Program.cs calls SetApplicationName with an explicit application name string
Program.cs does not disable automatic key management (KeyManagement.Enabled should remain true or not be set to false)
assertions.rationale: KeyManagement.Enabled is not set to false.
